keywords: additive subtractive MRR aggregation SubscriptionCancelled dual handler normalizeMrr ANNUAL CUSTOM formula subscription analytics metrics
ironRules: Subscribe to BOTH SubscriptionActivated (add path) AND SubscriptionCancelled (subtract path)
Additive-only aggregation permanently inflates MRR when subscriptions cancel
normalizeMrr() is NOT configurable — making it a FREEDOM key violates the machine/freedom boundary
